title: pilosella iserana subsp. luchavica
intro: Pilosella iserana subsp. luchavica is a subspecies of the Pilosella iserana plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb that grows in mountainous regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. Pilosella iserana subsp. luchavica is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
